title: Fix the Simple Array Duplicate Finder

statement.markdown: Write a function that takes in an array of integers and returns a new array containing the duplicates from the input array. If the input array does not contain any duplicates, return an empty array. The order of the elements in the output array does not matter.
statement.inputFormat: Input is an array of integers e.g. [1, 2, 3, 2, 4, 5, 5]
statement.outputFormat: Return a new array containing the duplicates e.g. [2, 5]

examples.explanation: Duplicates in the input array are 2 and 5
No duplicates in the input array

hints.text: Use the filter method to find duplicates

editorial.title: Editorial for Simple Array Duplicate Finder
editorial.intuition: Use a Set data structure to keep track of unique elements
editorial.bruteForce: Use nested loops to compare each element with others
editorial.optimalSolution: Use a Set to find duplicates in O(n) time complexity
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: Each element in the output array is a duplicate from the input array
commonMistakes: Not using a Set to find duplicates
